meta.title: Acrobatic Gymnastics Club Management Software in Argentina | Zaltyko - CGG
meta.description: Manage your federated acrobatic gymnastics club with Zaltyko. Full control over athletes, categories, pairs, groups, difficulty levels and CGG licenses.

hero.headline: Manage your federated acrobatic gymnastics club with ease
hero.subheadline: Full control over athletes, categories, acrobatic pairs and groups, difficulty levels and licenses. Argentine Championship and selectivos.

painPoints.generic: Coordinating acrobatic pairs and groups is chaos without the right tool. Tracking levels, compositions and scores on paper is a disaster.
painPoints.specific: Managing pair and group combinations, coordinating category changes, tracking D (difficulty) and E (execution) scores.
